title: Before you start

sub.all_ok: All set — add files or URLs below and press Start queue.
sub.needs_work: Complete the checklist (we detect tools and files automatically).

mode_hint.local: Mode: Local Whisper — cloud API key is not required.
mode_hint.browser: Mode: In-app Whisper — WASM in the UI layer; no API key or whisper-cli (ffmpeg / yt-dlp still required for URLs).
mode_hint.cloud: Mode: Cloud API — whisper-cli and ggml model are not required.

tools_unknown: Tools: unknown (run inside the desktop app to detect ffmpeg / yt-dlp)
tool_hint: Tip: in Settings — on Windows or macOS use Download ffmpeg & yt-dlp for me, or install manually.

ffmpeg.label: ffmpeg
ffmpeg.hint_missing: Missing — install from Settings or place next to the app.

ytdlp.label: yt-dlp
ytdlp.hint_missing: Missing — install from Settings or place next to the app.

output.label: Output folder
output.hint_missing: Not set — choose a folder in the setup guide or Settings.
output.hint_documents: Set — using Documents (default). Transcripts save here.

whisper_cli.label: whisper-cli (executable)
whisper_cli.hint_missing: Missing — pick whisper-cli in Settings (or put whisper-cli / main next to the app).

ggml.label: Whisper model (.bin)
ggml.hint_ok: Verified on disk (SHA-1) — ready for offline transcription.
ggml.hint_missing: Missing or checksum mismatch — use Download / verify model in Settings or setup.

wasm_whisper.label: In-app Whisper (WASM)
wasm_whisper.hint: Runs in the app (Transformers.js). First job may download the model; no API key or whisper-cli.

api_key.label: Cloud API key
api_key.hint_ok: Saved in OS secure storage — cloud transcription ready.
api_key.hint_missing: Missing — add your key in the setup guide or Settings (not used for Local Whisper).

deps_bar.tools_unknown: Tools: unknown (run inside Tauri to detect ffmpeg / yt-dlp)
